# Umesh Nagare

Umesh Nagare is an Engineer who builds software, writes articles, and solves backend problems.

## Contact & Links
- Website: https://umeshnagare.com
- GitHub: https://github.com/Algoture
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/umesh27/
- X (Twitter): https://x.com/umeshn22
- Email: umesh@umeshnagare.com

## Selected Projects

### Photowa
- URL: https://photowa.com
- Year: 2026
- Description: Conversational design studio built with an automated image-generation pipeline.
- Technologies: FastAPI, MongoDB, Redis, Next.js

### AstroYantra
- URL: https://astroyantra.siyoltechnologies.com
- Year: 2026
- Description: High-precision astronomical API engine computing planetary coordinates.
- Technologies: FastAPI, MySQL, Redis, Next.js

### Reelvo
- URL: https://www.reelvo.in
- Year: 2025
- Description: Instagram marketing automation and scheduling tool managing background tasks.
- Technologies: Flask, MySQL, Next.js, Tanstack Query

## Writings & Technical Articles

### Understanding CSR and SSR
- URL: https://umeshrenders.hashnode.dev/understanding-csr-and-ssr-a-simple-guide
- Date: 20/04/2025
- Description: A clear guide explaining Client-Side Rendering vs. Server-Side Rendering.

### Threads and Processes in CPU
- URL: https://umeshthreads.hashnode.dev/threads-and-processes-in-cpu
- Date: 08/03/2025
- Description: An exploration of the low-level mechanics of threads, processes, and CPU concurrency.
